description: agent-action that exercises a different recipient than granted — verifier MUST reject with E_SCOPE_DENIED per SPEC §8.1 step 12

expected.rejection_reason: scope_exercised lock:seal(recipient=bc1qmallory…) is not a sub-scope of any scope in v01.scopes (which grants only lock:seal(recipient=bc1qalice…)); the constraint key `recipient` has op `=` in the granted scope so the exercised value MUST match exactly per §7.4 rule 2.

harness_assertion: Given v01 as the cited delegation (which itself is well-formed per §8.1 steps 1–6), running §8.1 steps 7–12 against this action MUST return E_SCOPE_DENIED. The canonical message for this action is itself well-formed and the agent signature is irrelevant to the rejection: scope checking is purely structural.
